title: Webhook Configuration
content: Webhooks can be configured from Settings > Developer > Webhooks. Add the destination URL, choose event types, and copy the signing secret. CloudDash signs webhook requests with the X-CloudDash-Signature header. The receiver should verify the signature and return a 2xx response within 10 seconds. Failed deliveries are retried for up to 24 hours. Alert event webhooks are available on Pro and Enterprise plans.
